---
title: "GWAS Visualization"
author: "Kimberly Olney, Ph.D."
date: "March 2026"
output: html_document
---

# Set up
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, root.dir = ".")
# Set paths and libraries
.libPaths(c("/home/kolney/R/x86_64-pc-linux-gnu-library/"))
library(data.table)
library(ggmanh)
library(qqman)
library(ggplot2)

# Load SNP annotation once
snp_anno <- fread("../snp_array/reference/NCBI_SNP_positions_with_gene_hg19ToHg38_lift_over.tsv")
snp_anno[, `:=`(gene = Gene, SNP = names)] # Efficient column creation in data.table
chr_labels <- c(1:22)
```

# Define a function to process, plot, and save results
```{r}
process_gwas <- function(file_path, trait_name, colors, output_prefix) {
  # 1. Load and Merge
  gwas <- fread(file_path)
  gwas_snp <- merge(gwas, snp_anno, by = "SNP")
  gwas_snp$CHR <- factor(gwas_snp$CHR, levels = chr_labels)
  
  # 2. Prepare Labels
  gwas_snp$label <- ifelse(gwas_snp$P < 1e-5, gwas_snp$gene, NA)
  
  # 3. Manhattan Plot
  man_plot <- manhattan_plot(
    x = gwas_snp, pval.colname = "P", chr.colname = "CHR", pos.colname = "BP",
    plot.title = paste("GWAS", trait_name), y.label = "-log10(p-value)",
    chr.col = colors, label.colname = "label", label.font.size = 2.75,
    highlight.colname = "label", highlight.col = "black"
  )
  print(man_plot)
  ggsave(paste0("../results/gwas/manhattan_", output_prefix, ".pdf"), 
         plot = man_plot, width = 8, height = 4.5)

  # 4. QQ Plot
  pdf(paste0("../results/gwas/qq_", output_prefix, ".pdf"), width = 5, height = 5)
  qqman::qq(gwas_snp$P, main = paste("QQ Plot:", trait_name), 
            pch = 18, col = colors[1], cex = 1.5, las = 1)
  dev.off()
  
  # Show QQ in RMarkdown
  qqman::qq(gwas_snp$P, main = paste("QQ Plot:", trait_name), col = colors[1])
}
```

# Define GWAS tasks: list(file, title, colors, filename_suffix)
```{r}
tasks <- list(
  list("../snp_array/associations_with_imputed_snps/Braak_association_imputed_covar_adj.assoc.linear", 
       "Braak NFT Stage", c("navyblue", "skyblue2"), "Braak"),
  
  list("../snp_array/associations_with_imputed_snps/Thal_association_imputed.assoc.linear", 
       "Thal Amyloid Phase", c("#741551ff", "#dbabbcff"), "Thal"),
  
  list("../snp_array/associations_with_imputed_snps/CingLB_association_imputed_covar_adj.assoc.linear", 
       "Cingulate Lewy Body Count", c("gold3", "grey3"), "CingLB")
)

# Execute for each task
for (task in tasks) {
  process_gwas(task[[1]], task[[2]], task[[3]], task[[4]])
}
```
